@glassresistor imho I’d make an issue “No roadmap” and in it ask why, and if the author(s) want help making it happen
@glassresistor I try to keep it segmented, suggestions thru email need to get added to a to-do list and remembered, issues are right there
@glassresistor On a big project (25+ contributors) I would maybe agree, but for smaller projects issues cant really hurt (unless redundant)
@glassresistor imho making issues is the ideal way for a stranger to highlight a problem or ask for a way to help out. Simple and easy.
